title: Incomplete vector type coverage in schema.json
description: oneOf in vectors.items only defines schc_vector, l2_payload_vector, frame_vector, announce_coords_vector, meshtastic_app_compat_vector, meshcore_app_compat_vector, oscore_vector, rpl_messages_vector, ccp_tdma_vector, ccp15_vector, ccp_load_balancing_vector. But test/vectors/ contains compact_cot.json (uses binary_hex/decoded_fields), node_address.json, yggdrasil.json, schnorr48.json (top-level name/spec not format_version), oscore.json partially. Schema test in python/tests/test_vectors.py only covers subset. New ccp* defs are minimal placeholders. P2 test coverage gap per coding guidelines.
